Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 15}While exploring the Abyss of Time, you may encounter the rare {f 0 1 2}Formidable Shadow{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 15}Defeating them will yield greater rewards than usual, but {f 0 1 2}brace yourself for a trying battle{f 0 1 27} and take care not to become the hunted.[n]{f 1 1}
